title: Configure OpenCode workstation
description: Mount the prepared Zephyr EBS volume, install OpenCode and required host tooling without copying secret tokens, and update the repository checkout to origin/wip/checkpoint-20260715.
close_reason: Mounted and persisted the Zephyr volume, installed Amazon Linux build dependencies, OpenCode 1.18.3 with OpenAI OAuth and global review commands, cargo-hack, typos, Hati 0.1.0, and cloned project-LICHEN at 940760eab without touching the legacy dirty checkout.
